title: Duck's Hypixel Collection
description: Hypixel Plus Resources and Supporting Mods for Hypixel's Skyblock
body:
# Duck's Hypixel Skyblock Collection
### Love Hypixel's Skyblock but wish it had better visuals? Then this is the modpack for you. 
A lightweight visual overhaul modpack for the Hypixel Skyblock and other Hypixel Server Games. It Including [Hypixel Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hypixel-plus) for the main item/armour and ui resources, as well as util mods like [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) and efficiency mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium). There are many other visual mods to bring together a great mix to make the skyblock game look the best it can. 
Gives all farm animals new models and animations, through the EMF and ETF mods and the Better Farm Animals resource pack. Beautiful new skys, crops and ui changes.
